knowledge_base_description: Fictional airport knowledge base for the multimodal passenger assistance chatbot. Records are synthetic and do not represent any real airport.

records.name: Gate B12
records.description: Boarding gate B12, used mainly for short-haul European departures.
records.directions: From the central security exit, follow signs to Zone B and continue straight for about 200 metres. Gate B12 is on the right.
records.accessibility: Step-free access via elevator near Zone B entrance. Wheelchair assistance available on request.
records.visual_description: gate sign with letter and number B12, departure gate signage, boarding gate board with flight information

records.name: Gate A05
records.description: Boarding gate A05, used for domestic departures.
records.directions: From security, turn left towards Zone A. Gate A05 is the fifth gate on the left.
records.accessibility: Step-free access. Priority seating available near the gate.
records.visual_description: gate sign A05, domestic departure gate signage, illuminated gate number board

records.name: Gate C22
records.description: Boarding gate C22, used for long-haul international departures.
records.directions: Take the inter-terminal train to Terminal 2, then follow signs to Zone C on Floor 3. Gate C22 is near the far end.
records.accessibility: Step-free access via elevators. Accessible restrooms nearby.
records.visual_description: gate sign C22, international departure gate signage, large gate information display

records.name: Terminal 1 International Check-in
records.description: Check-in desks for international flights departing from Terminal 1.
records.directions: Enter through the main Terminal 1 departures entrance. Check-in desks are directly ahead in rows 1 to 20.
records.accessibility: Level access throughout. Dedicated assistance desk at row 1.
records.visual_description: check-in counter with desks and queue barriers, airline check-in sign, departures hall with check-in rows

records.name: Terminal 1 Domestic Check-in
records.description: Check-in desks for domestic flights in Terminal 1.
records.directions: From the main entrance, turn right towards rows 21 to 30 for domestic check-in.
records.accessibility: Level access. Self-service kiosks at accessible height available.
records.visual_description: domestic check-in desks, self-service check-in kiosks, airline counter signage

records.name: Terminal 1 Baggage Claim Hall
records.description: Baggage reclaim hall for Terminal 1 arrivals, with carousels 1 to 6.
records.directions: After passport control, follow the 'Baggage Reclaim' signs down one level. The hall is straight ahead.
records.accessibility: Step-free access via ramp and elevator. Low-height trolleys available.
records.visual_description: baggage claim symbol with suitcase icon, luggage carousel conveyor belt, baggage reclaim hall sign

records.name: Terminal 2 Baggage Claim Hall
records.description: Baggage reclaim hall for Terminal 2 international arrivals, carousels 7 to 12.
records.directions: Follow 'Baggage Reclaim' signs after customs in Terminal 2. Take the elevator to Floor 0.
records.accessibility: Fully step-free. Assistance staff available on request.
records.visual_description: suitcase baggage symbol, conveyor belt luggage carousel, arrivals baggage reclaim signage

records.name: Terminal 1 Security Control
records.description: Central security screening checkpoint for all Terminal 1 departures.
records.directions: After checking in, proceed straight ahead past the departures boards to the security entrance.
records.accessibility: Accessible lane available. Staff trained to assist passengers with reduced mobility.
records.visual_description: security checkpoint sign, x-ray scanner and metal detector gate, security control signage with guard symbol

records.name: Terminal 1 Information Desk
records.description: Staffed information desk providing general help, directions, and flight guidance in Terminal 1.
records.directions: Located in the centre of the Terminal 1 departures hall, beneath the main flight information display.
records.accessibility: Level access. Hearing loop installed. Multilingual staff where available.
records.visual_description: information desk sign with letter i symbol, help desk counter, airport information point signage

records.name: Terminal 2 Information Desk
records.description: Staffed information desk for Terminal 2 passengers.
records.directions: In the centre of the Terminal 2 arrivals area, opposite the exit doors.
records.accessibility: Level access. Hearing loop installed.
records.visual_description: information point sign with i symbol, help desk, customer service counter signage

records.name: Skyview Lounge (Terminal 2)
records.description: Premium passenger lounge near the international gates in Terminal 2, with seating, food, and quiet areas.
records.directions: After security in Terminal 2, take the elevator to Floor 3 and follow signs to Zone C. The lounge entrance is on the left.
records.accessibility: Step-free access. Accessible restroom inside the lounge.
records.visual_description: airport lounge sign, comfortable seating area with armchairs, premium lounge entrance signage

records.name: Terminal 2 Food Court
records.description: Food court with several restaurants and cafes in Terminal 2.
records.directions: On Floor 2 of Terminal 2, in the central area between Zone B and Zone C.
records.accessibility: Level access. Accessible seating available at all outlets.
records.visual_description: restaurant and food court sign, dining area with tables, fork and knife restaurant symbol

records.name: Restroom Zone B (Terminal 1)
records.description: Public restrooms in Zone B near the departure gates.
records.directions: Near Gate B12, follow the restroom symbols. Located beside the seating area.
records.accessibility: Accessible restroom with grab rails and baby-changing facilities.
records.visual_description: restroom toilet symbol, male and female restroom sign, accessible toilet wheelchair symbol

records.name: Multi-Faith Prayer Room (Terminal 1)
records.description: Quiet multi-faith prayer and reflection room open to all passengers.
records.directions: From the Terminal 1 information desk, walk towards the east corridor. The prayer room is signposted on the right.
records.accessibility: Step-free access. Ablution facilities available.
records.visual_description: prayer room sign, multi-faith room symbol, quiet reflection room signage

records.name: Lost and Found Office
records.description: Office handling lost property reports and recovered items for both terminals.
records.directions: In the Terminal 1 arrivals area, next to the baggage claim hall exit.
records.accessibility: Level access. Assistance available on request.
records.visual_description: lost and found office sign, lost property counter, question mark help symbol

records.name: Terminal 1 Customs
records.description: Customs and passport control for Terminal 1 arrivals.
records.directions: Follow the 'Arrivals' and 'Passport Control' signs after leaving the aircraft. Customs is after passport checks.
records.accessibility: Step-free access. Dedicated assistance lane available.
records.visual_description: customs sign, passport control booth, border control signage

records.name: Currency Exchange (Terminal 1)
records.description: Currency exchange and ATM services in Terminal 1.
records.directions: Near the Terminal 1 information desk, beside the entrance to security.
records.accessibility: Level access. Lowered counter available.
records.visual_description: currency exchange sign, foreign exchange bureau, money exchange and ATM symbol

records.name: Special Assistance Desk (Terminal 1)
records.description: Desk providing mobility assistance and support for passengers with reduced mobility or disabilities.
records.directions: At the entrance of the Terminal 1 departures hall, to the left of the main doors.
records.accessibility: Fully accessible. Wheelchair service, guided assistance, and hearing support available.
records.visual_description: special assistance sign, wheelchair accessibility symbol, disability support desk signage

records.name: Airport Train Station
records.description: Underground train station connecting the airport to the city centre.
records.directions: Take the elevator or escalator down to the Transport Level (Floor -1) from the Terminal 1 arrivals hall. Follow the train symbols.
records.accessibility: Step-free access via elevators to all platforms. Tactile paving installed.
records.visual_description: train station sign, railway platform symbol, airport rail link signage

records.name: Taxi Pickup Zone
records.description: Official taxi rank located outside the Terminal 1 arrivals exit.
records.directions: Exit the Terminal 1 arrivals hall through the main doors. The taxi rank is directly outside under the canopy.
records.accessibility: Level access. Accessible taxis available on request at the taxi marshal point.
records.visual_description: taxi sign, taxi pickup zone signage, car and taxi rank symbol
